## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] No `dd()`, `var_dump()`, or debug output left in code
- [ ] New env vars added to `.env.example`
- [ ] New integrations documented in `docs/`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a user-facing change
